mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `group` (group_name, group_id, creator_id, created_at, updated_at,members) VALUES (#{groupName}, #{groupId}, #{userId}, NOW(), NOW(),#{members})
INSERT INTO group_member (group_id, user_id, join_time,role) VALUES (#{groupId}, #{userId}, NOW(),#{role})id
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM group_user WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO group_message (group_id, user_id, message, create_time) VALUES (#{groupId}, #{userId}, #{message}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT u.* FROM user u JOIN group_user gu ON u.id = gu.user_id WHERE gu.group_id = #{groupId}
